<a name="Server"></a>
## type [Server](<https://github.com/yandu-app/skills-fs/blob/main/adapter/fuse/fuse.go#L11-L16>)

Server wraps a core.FileSystem in a FUSE mount. The Mount and Unmount methods are defined in platform\-specific files \(mount\_linux.go for Linux, mount\_stub.go for everything else\).

```go
type Server struct {
    // contains filtered or unexported fields
}
```
